string.name: light_painting_details
string.value: Create special light and shadow effects. Choose from four preset modes (traffic trails, light graffiti, silky water, and star trails) tailored to the most common light painting scenarios. For best results, use a tripod.

When using the front camera to take portraits, the phone provides fill lighting to eliminate unwanted shadows on the subject's face. Selfies taken at night also come out clear and bright.

string.name: wide_aperture_details_more

string.value: This is used to display and store photos and videos you take.

string.name: efficient_video_encoding_format_description
string.value: Videos take up about %1$s less space, but may not play on other devices.

string.name: headset_snap_shot_hint
string.value: Press the answer key on the headset to take photos or videos.

string.name: guidance_collaboration_desc
string.value: When you're taking a mirror selfie, you can have the cover screen display a personalised image that will appear alongside you in the shot. To set this up, go to the quick menu in Camera and tap Dual preview.

string.name: custom_filter_icon_tip
string.value: Tap the %s icon to quickly switch XMAGE styles.

string.name: fluorescence_introduce
string.value: Fluorescence photography is a camera mode which uses a UV fill light. When re-emitted from certain materials, the UV light gives off fluorescent colours which can be captured as stylised photographs.

string.name: night_view_no_iso_short
string.value: Night mode allows you to capture sharp, bright images even in low-light conditions, thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm.

string.name: new_night_view_details_short
string.value: Capture sharp, bright images in low-light conditions thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm. Four shooting modes are available: Super nightshot, Moon shot, Starry sky, and Starry portrait.

string.name: security_confirm_permissions_needed_pc
string.value: This app requires the %1$s, %2$s, and %3$s permissions. It also needs to read photos and videos in order to display photos and videos you take.

string.name: request_location_msg
string.value: Allow location access so Camera can geotag your photos and videos. This lets you see where they were taken in Gallery.

string.name: filter_drop_frame_rates_tip
string.value: Current filter is unavailable at %1$s (%2$d fps). Automatically switched to %3$dp (%4$d) fps.

string.name: night_capture_desc
string.value:
Keep the device steady.
Wait for the countdown or tap the shutter to capture a photo.

string.name: high_res_details_more
string.value: High resolution photography has a higher pixel density, for greater clarity and detail. In High-res mode, photos may take a little longer to produce. Hold the phone steady until the process is complete.

string.name: custom_filter_card_more_button_tip
string.value: Tap here to import a custom style.

string.name: settingView_entry_prompt_information
string.value: For Settings %s, tap or swipe up on the arrow at the bottom.

string.name: picker_security_camera_banner_content
string.value: This app can only access the photos and videos that you take. It can't view what's in the viewfinder. %1$s

string.name: please_improve_ambient_light_new
string.value: When Steady shot is on, picture quality is best when there is plenty of light.
